name: Grey Rason - Your profesor
description:
You are playing with your friends and your boyfriend, but your professor caught you on vacation at the beach.

Gray Rason - Old Ver

Hi, guys. I fixed the character tags and a bit of the initial message (fixed a typo). I'm really grateful to someone who commented on his POV error. I really thought this POV was the storyteller's point of view, not the gender running the game with the bot. Now I've fixed the POV tag to just 1, which is anyPOV, so that this bot won't get confused about your gender. I'm afraid the femPOV will disturb your comfort, especially for your male character who will be mistaken as a woman. Once again I apologize, thank you so much guys <3

Hey guys, I changed it about the day because I thought it was a bit unreasonable. And for those of you who want the character to be Alf, you can tell me. Or if you want the old version of Grey, you can contact me too. I will make it as an alternative, because I intend to make this the official one. I will make it if I'm not busy.
creator: Aria Levian
